parsed_review.summary: CP00-497 is a clean, additive, descriptor-only governance slice (RP16.P05.M06.S01-S10, risk A, 10 units) that passes independent read-only review. Pack binding, deliverable distribution {fixture:6, claude_review:1, implementation:3}, and micro-title {Synthetic Fixture Set:10} are consistent across closeout-pack-plan.json, manifest.json, registry requirements, the governance contract, and the prompt baseline. service.js (freezeCp497Result), validators.js, registry attestation, and contract no_write_attestation enforce descriptor-only/no-runtime/no-write/no-real-data boundaries; Claude is held as read-only reviewer with claude_is_final_approval=false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false, and claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation=false. Hermes patterns are used only for deterministic evidence-packet/receipt strings (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false), not product runtime. Three dedicated CP497 tests plus the validate script deepEqual-assert the contract against in-code descriptors/requirements/attestation, and command-evidence records all pre-review gates green. production_ready is correctly false (descriptor layer, runtime_ready false) with no over-claim. CP178+ review hardening is satisfied: review-request uses claude-opus-4-8/max/read-only with only Read,Grep,Glob; readiness auth-preflight passed with valid non-empty JSON; no forbidden tools; summary-only review correctly disallowed. The post-review artifacts (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json) are absent as expected at this pre-review stage. One P3 informational observation recorded regarding unrelated dirty worktree files that are correctly scoped out. No P0/P1/P2 issues; closeout is not blocked.

findings.title: Unrelated dirty worktree files present alongside pack scope (correctly excluded)
findings.details: scripts/progress-control-room-data.mjs and tools/progress-control-room/index.html are modified in the worktree but belong to the separate progress/UI workstream. I confirmed via grep that neither file references CP00-497 or governance_core_p05_fixture. changed-file-scope.json (unrelated_dirty_files_preserved) and manifest.json (worktree_transition_policy.unrelated_dirty_files_preserved) correctly classify them as unrelated and exclude them from active_pack_implementation_refs. This is an informational scoping note, not a defect in pack content.
findings.recommendation: Ensure the closeout commit stages only the documented CP00-497 governance/pack files and does not sweep in the unrelated UI-workstream files (progress-control-room) or the untracked workbook artifacts. No change to pack implementation is required.
findings.post_review_disposition: Acknowledged. Correctly scoped out by changed-file-scope.json and manifest worktree_transition_policy; informational only and does not block pack or goal closeout.
